title: IAM user has active access keys older than 90 days
description: Service account using long-lived IAM user credentials. Keys last rotated 340 days ago.
remediation: Replace IAM user with IAM role and IRSA. Rotate keys immediately if cannot replace.
notes: FCA SYSC 13 expects robust access key management

title: S3 bucket allows public read access
description: S3 bucket tilington-temp-uploads-prod has public read ACL enabled. May contain customer PII.
remediation: Disable public access block. Enable S3 Block Public Access at account level.
notes: UK GDPR breach risk. Immediate action required. Emma Clarke notified.

title: RDS cluster does not have deletion protection enabled
description: Aurora cluster can be deleted without additional confirmation. Contains production customer data.
remediation: Enable deletion protection on Aurora cluster.
notes: FCA PS21/3 operational resilience - data loss risk

title: Security group allows unrestricted inbound SSH access (0.0.0.0/0)
description: EKS node security group has port 22 open to 0.0.0.0/0.
remediation: Remove SSH rule. Use SSM Session Manager for node access instead.

title: IAM policy uses wildcard (*) actions
description: Terraform deployment role has iam:* and ec2:* with no resource conditions.
remediation: Replace wildcards with specific actions. Add resource ARN conditions.

title: UnauthorizedAccess:EC2/SSHBruteForce
description: SSH brute force attack detected on til-prod-app-01 from 185.234.219.110 (known Tor exit node). 847 failed attempts in 10 minutes.
remediation: Investigate. Add IP to WAF block list. Review security group (SF-004 related).

title: EC2 instance has no tags - unidentified resource
description: EC2 instance i-0nonprod003 has no Name Application Environment or Owner tags. Owner unknown.
remediation: Identify owner. Apply mandatory tags or terminate if orphaned.
notes: Governance issue. See cost report - this instance costs $98.40/month with unknown owner.

title: CloudTrail log file validation is not enabled
description: CloudTrail logs can be modified without detection. Required for FCA audit integrity.
remediation: Enable log file validation on CloudTrail trail.

title: KMS key rotation is not enabled
description: Customer managed KMS key has automatic rotation disabled. Annual rotation required.
remediation: Enable automatic key rotation on all CMKs.

title: VPC flow logs are not enabled
description: VPC flow logs disabled on production VPC. Cannot investigate network anomalies or FCA audit.
remediation: Enable VPC flow logs to CloudWatch or S3.
notes: FCA operational risk - no network visibility

title: S3 bucket does not have server-side encryption enabled
description: Dev artifact bucket uses SSE-S3 not SSE-KMS. May contain build artefacts with embedded credentials.
remediation: Enable SSE-KMS on all S3 buckets. Use tilington-production-data CMK.

title: RDS cluster backup retention period is less than 7 days
description: Aurora cluster backup retention set to 3 days. FCA record keeping requires longer retention.
remediation: Increase backup retention to minimum 35 days. Enable automated backups.
notes: FCA COBS record keeping - some records require 5-7 year retention

title: EKS cluster does not have audit logging enabled
description: EKS audit logs not enabled. Cannot audit who ran what kubectl commands.
remediation: Enable audit control plane logs on EKS cluster.
notes: FCA audit requirement - all privileged actions must be logged

title: IAM password policy does not require uppercase letters
description: Password policy missing complexity requirements.
remediation: Update IAM password policy. Enable MFA enforcement via SCP.

title: Recon:IAMUser/UserPermissions - Permission reconnaissance
description: IAM user security-scanner queried GetAccountAuthorizationDetails across 6 accounts. Possible credential compromise or insider threat.
remediation: Investigate immediately. Rotate credentials. Check CloudTrail for follow-on actions.
notes: Could be legitimate security scanner or genuine reconnaissance. Verify with team.

title: EC2 instance is not managed by Systems Manager SSM
description: EC2 instance not registered with SSM. Cannot use Session Manager or Patch Manager.
remediation: Install SSM agent. Attach SSM instance profile.
notes: Pre-requisite for replacing SSH access with SSM (see SF-004)

title: Security group has overly permissive inbound rules from VPC CIDR
description: Aurora security group allows 5432 from entire VPC CIDR (10.30.0.0/16) not just EKS nodes.
remediation: Restrict to EKS node security group only. Remove VPC-wide rule.

title: S3 object contains potential PII - National Insurance Numbers detected
description: Macie detected NI numbers in 14 objects in tilington-temp-uploads-prod. Bucket is publicly accessible (SF-002).
remediation: IMMEDIATE: Restrict public access (SF-002). Notify DPO. Assess ICO notification requirement.
notes: Potential UK GDPR breach. ICO notification may be required within 72 hours.

title: ECR repository image scan on push not enabled
description: Container images not automatically scanned for CVEs on push to ECR.
remediation: Enable scan on push for all ECR repositories.

title: DynamoDB table does not have point-in-time recovery enabled
description: AuditTrail DynamoDB table has PITR disabled. FCA audit data at risk from accidental deletion.
remediation: Enable PITR on AuditTrail table. Consider also enabling DynamoDB Streams for replication.
notes: FCA SYSC 9 - audit trail must be recoverable
